text: My order took 9 days to ship even though I paid for standard shipping. Nobody told me it would be delayed.
I don't understand why my discount was only 5% when the site said gold members get more. Confusing.
Return process took forever and I was charged a restocking fee I wasn't told about.
Great product quality, but the checkout page froze twice before my order went through.
Wish there were more payment options, I wanted to use a different card split across two payments.
Shipping estimate said 3 days, took 8. This is the second time this month.
Love the loyalty program, platinum tier perks are worth it.
Refund was denied and the reason given didn't make sense to me. I returned the item within a month.
Holiday discount was nice but stacking rules were unclear, I expected more off with my promo code.
Customer support was helpful but it took three emails to get a straight answer about my return.
